name: dokkan-calculator
description: Free Dokkan Battle ATK calculator for players - predict enemy attack damage during fights

scripts.preobfuscate: npm run generate-og-image && echo 'Original files ready for obfuscation'
scripts.obfuscate: javascript-obfuscator js/data.js --output dist/data-obfuscated.js && javascript-obfuscator js/formulas.js --output dist/formulas-obfuscated.js
scripts.netlify-build: echo 'Using pre-obfuscated files - no build needed'
